instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect shift actuator failures.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Shift_Actuator_Status equals Fault.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Fault THEN Actuator_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect clutch actuator faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Clutch_Actuator_Status equals Fault.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Actuator_Status = Fault THEN Actuator_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate limp-home mode during actuator failure.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable limp-home mode when Actuator_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Actuator_Fault = TRUE THEN Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect actuator position mismatch.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Actual_Actuator_Position deviates from Commanded_Position.

L4_requirements: IF Actual_Actuator_Position != Commanded_Position THEN Actuator_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable shifting when actuator faults occur.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shift commands when Actuator_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Actuator_Fault = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect actuator response delays.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when actuator response time exceeds Response_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Actuator_Response_Time > Response_Threshold THEN Actuator_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect hydraulic actuator pressure failures.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Hydraulic_Pressure falls below Pressure_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Hydraulic_Pressure < Pressure_Limit THEN Actuator_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate faulty actuators.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify faulty actuator when Fault_Code equals Actuator_Fault.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent repeated actuator failures.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable actuator commands when repeated faults are detected.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restore normal actuator control when faults are cleared.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear actuator fault status when Actuator_Status equals Operational.
